prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜排名近年约128→134→137，排名略有下滑但仍属全国中上游；2022年声誉偏负面（宿舍条件问题），2026年声誉中性/混合（图书馆管理）；抖音热度一般（总排名第104位）；无投档断档记录。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续偏高；本省物理类考生2021年205920→2025年320192→2026年347000，2026年较2025年增加约8.4%，竞争略有加剧；省控线2025年405分，近年波动不大。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年物理类计划大幅扩招约48.4%的强烈扩招效应，以及本省考生增加约8.4%的竞争加剧因素，扩招主导下位次预计继续后移；但2025年位次55007已较2024年大幅后移4445名，连续大幅后移后存在一定企稳可能。，结合考生增加小幅回调，预测最低位次约70793名，区间70293–71293名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 34604 → 38266 → 38902 → 50562 → 55007, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 20443 places in the last 3 years. The 2025 baseline is about 55007. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan: 2021: 27 → 2022: 35 → 2023: 32 → 2024: 52 → 2025: 64 → 2026: 95. In 2026, compared to 2025, there is a significant expansion of about 48.4%, greatly alleviating competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking in recent years: about 128 → 134 → 137, slightly declining but still in the upper-middle tier nationally. In 2022, reputation was somewhat negative (dormitory condition issues); in 2026, reputation is neutral/mixed (library management). Douyin popularity is average (ranked 104th overall). No record of admission cutoff gaps.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity. Provincial Physics Category examinees: 2021: 205920 → 2025: 320192 → 2026: 347000, an increase of about 8.4% from 2025 to 2026, slightly intensifying competition. Provincial control line in 2025 is 405 points, with little fluctuation in recent years.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong expansion effect of about 48.4% in the 2026 Physics Category enrollment plan, combined with the competition intensification factor of about 8.4% increase in provincial examinees, the ranking is expected to continue shifting backward under the dominant expansion effect. However, the 2025 ranking of 55007 has already shifted significantly backward by 4445 places compared to 2024, and after consecutive large backward shifts, there is a possibility of stabilization. Combined with a slight correction due to the increase in examinees, the predicted minimum ranking is about 70793, with a range of 70293–71293.

For rankings within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety. For rankings significantly better than the lower bound (within 70293), prioritize competitive engineering majors such as Computer Science and Electronic Information. For rankings near the upper bound (outside 71293), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors as safety options.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the slight expansion of about 11.1% in the 2026 History Category enrollment plan, but a substantial increase of about 31.2% in provincial History Category examinees, the competition intensification effect far outweighs the expansion mitigation effect, and the ranking is expected to continue moving backward.
